Localization.Description: Detects creation of suspicious files by legitimate processes

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Security bypass attempt detected, process {subject.process.name} created file {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
Attempted security breach by the user {subject.account.name} who started process {subject.process.name} and created file {object.name} on the host {event_src.host}
Attempted security breach by the user with the SID {subject.account.id} who started process {subject.process.name} and created file {object.name} on the host {event_src.host}
